name: CustomTitleContributor
summary: The contract every source of title text satisfies to take part in the composed document.title. A contributor declares its layer (base | template | decoration | transient), a priority within that layer, and a contribute(current) function that returns its share of the title given the lower layers' result. The route's base title, a site template, the Notification Marker count prefix, and a transient 'Saving…' override are all just contributors registered in CustomTitleRegistry — the registry orders them by layer and folds them into one string.
